'''gachate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:weightwise|weightwise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ch-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:weightwise|weightwise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gachate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:gachate|gachate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gachatesher|gachatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gachatesherĂ«m|gachatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gachatero|gachatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gachateshĂ«|gachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gachateshĂ«m|gachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigachatero|gokigachatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigachateshĂ«|gokigachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigachateshĂ«m|gokigachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogachankerom|gogachankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogachankeshĂ«|gogachankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogachankeshĂ«m|gogachankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogachankeya|gogachankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gachaterom|gachaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gachatemu|gachatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gachateya|gachateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigachaterom|gokigachaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigachatemu|gokigachatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigachateya|gokigachateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:gachachate|gachachate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gachachatesher|gachachatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gachachatesherĂ«m|gachachatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gachachatero|gachachatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gachachateshĂ«|gachachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gachachateshĂ«m|gachachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigachachatero|gokigachachatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigachachateshĂ«|gokigachachateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigachachateshĂ«m|gokigachachateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogachachankerom|gogachachankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogachachankeshĂ«|gogachachankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogachachankeshĂ«m|gogachachankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogachachankeya|gogachachankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gachachaterom|gachachaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gachachatemu|gachachatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gachachateya|gachachateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigachachaterom|gokigachachaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigachachatemu|gokigachachatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigachachateya|gokigachachateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:gĂŠchĂŠte|gĂŠchĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gĂŠchĂŠtesher|gĂŠchĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠchĂŠtesherĂ«m|gĂŠchĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gĂŠchĂŠtero|gĂŠchĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«|gĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m|gĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigĂŠchĂŠtero|gokigĂŠchĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«|gokigĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m|gokigĂŠchĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogĂŠchĂŠnkerom|gogĂŠchĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«|gogĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gogĂŠchĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogĂŠchĂŠnkeya|gogĂŠchĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gĂŠchĂŠterom|gĂŠchĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠchĂŠtemu|gĂŠchĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gĂŠchĂŠteya|gĂŠchĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigĂŠchĂŠterom|gokigĂŠchĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigĂŠchĂŠtemu|gokigĂŠchĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigĂŠchĂŠteya|gokigĂŠchĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:gafchafte|gafchafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gafchaftesher|gafchaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafchaftesherĂ«m|gafchaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gafchaftero|gafchaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gafchafteshĂ«|gafchafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafchafteshĂ«m|gafchafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigafchaftero|gokigafchaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigafchafteshĂ«|gokigafchafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafchafteshĂ«m|gokigafchafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogafchafnkerom|gogafchafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogafchafnkeshĂ«|gogafchafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogafchafnkeshĂ«m|gogafchafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogafchafnkeya|gogafchafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gafchafterom|gafchafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafchaftemu|gafchaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gafchafteya|gafchafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigafchafterom|gokigafchafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafchaftemu|gokigafchaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigafchafteya|gokigafchafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
